content.en:
Deep in the Void.

In a special gem.

Ye Tian followed the Longyan Ancient Emperor here, and in addition to him, there were many eightfold to the Dao realm and a few to the ninefold Dao realm, all of whom came here to cultivate and improve their cultivation.

After all, if they were to cultivate by themselves, they would have to spend countless resources and countless years before they could raise their cultivation to a small level.

If you enter here and quickly improve your cultivation, it will naturally be a great opportunity, not only saving countless cultivation time, but also saving countless resources.

"Let's go inside!"

The group of Supreme Dao Realm entered the treasure land and saw a lake condensed by special energy.

"This energy contains a trace of regular aura, and it is the fourth sequence of supreme path aura. "

Ye Tian guessed that the fourth sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items must have been born here, but they were taken away.

If the energy lake here is not absorbed, it will slowly degenerate into an ordinary energy lake after a long time.

That's why the Innate Origin Domain Alliance was so generous, allowing a group of Supreme Dao Realms to come here to cultivate.

Of course.

Ye Tian was also valued by the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, otherwise he would not have wanted to have such an opportunity.

Whoa!!!

A group of Supreme Dao Realm people came in, occupied an area of the lake one by one, and began to cultivate.

Ye Tian also entered the energy lake and quickly absorbed the energy in the lake.

Rumble!!!!!

A large amount of energy swept through his body, refining his body and improving his cultivation.

"The cultivation effect is too good, it is many times faster than refining other resources to cultivate!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's cultivation steadily improved, gradually approaching the peak realm of the sevenfold Dao realm.

Time flies.

More than three hundred to the end of the Dao era.

The energy lake here was one-third smaller, and at this time, Ye Tian's cultivation had finally been raised to the peak realm of the Sevenfold Dao Realm.

Subsequently, it took him a little more time to raise his cultivation to the limit of the Sevenfold Dao Realm, and he could hardly improve even a little more.

"It's time to hit the Eightfold Dao Realm!"

Ye Tian directly struck the Eightfold Dao Realm.

He took out some resources that would help him break through the realm, and after refining them in one bite, he began to impact the realm.

With the assistance of the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, it was too easy for him to break through the realm.

Dozens of years later, he successfully broke through the bottleneck.

Rumble!!!!!

Ye Tian's cultivation broke through, and his body frantically swallowed the energy around him, and a large amount of energy was devoured by him, helping him cross the realm.

At this time, a group of Supreme Dao Realms came over one after another.

"Ye Tian has broken through to the Eightfold Dao Realm, he is the Supreme Dao Realm who has taken the path of the strongest Dao, this breakthrough, his strength has skyrocketed!"

"How did I sense the breath of the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules on him, if the peak of the ordinary Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm comprehends the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, he can impact the realm above the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm!"

"The eightfold to the Dao realm that comprehends the rules of the fourth sequence of the supreme Dao, and also takes the path of the strongest to the Dao, this kind of combat power is enough to be called invincible in the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm, and can kill the top Ninefold Dao realm in seconds, which is weaker than the Immortal Emperor and the Ninefold Dao Realm who walks the strongest to the Dao. "

This group of Supreme Dao Realm was extremely envious of Ye Tian, discussed it for a while, and continued to cultivate.

In the blink of an eye, another period of time has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's cultivation had officially stabilized at the early stage of the Eightfold Dao Realm.

"I broke through, but unfortunately there is very little energy here, not enough to advance my cultivation to the middle stage of the Eightfold Dao Realm. "

However, Ye Tian adheres to the principle of not taking advantage of the loss and continuing to cultivate here, and he can improve his cultivation a little!

In this way, more than 500 years of the Dao Era have passed.

Finally, this lake of energy was depleted.

Many Supreme Dao Realms showed a look of regret, they wanted to cultivate here for a while longer, but unfortunately they had no energy.

"Let's all go back!"

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan came over again and took them out of here.

......

Winter Night's Fortress.

Ye Tian is back.

"Cultivation has reached the early stage of the Eightfold Dao Realm, and it is impossible to break through to the middle of the Eightfold Dao Realm in a short period of time, and the fourth sequence of the Dao rules has reached the eighty percent and seven realms, and if there are no items of the fourth sequence of the Dao rules, there is no way to improve quickly. My current strength has reached a situation where it is difficult to improve, and I have to find a way to find other opportunities. "

At this time, he remembered the Lost Realm.

But if you want to enter the Lost Realm, you must obtain the Lost Gold Leaf.

So, he posted the news of the Supreme Void seeking to buy the Lost Gold Leaf.

I thought that there was no Dao Realm that would sell the Lost Gold Leaf, but the Ancient Emperor of Longyan contacted him.

The Supreme Void.

Ye Tian met with the Ancient Emperor of Longyan.

"Ancient Emperor Longyan, you have lost the golden leaf in your hand again?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Emperor Longyan nodded slightly: "Although the Lost Golden Leaf is rare, for a strong person like us, it can still be found with a little more time, so there are basically a few Lost Golden Leaves on our hands." You want to lose the gold leaf, I can give it to you, but I don't need the Eternal Gold Coins. "

"Longyan Ancient Emperor, what do you want, please say. "

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"I need an item!" Longyan Ancient Emperor put forward his own request, "After you enter the Lost Land, I need you to find an ore material of Longyan Linshi, my request is one hundred cubic Longyan Linshi, if you find it, you don't need to pay any price for Lost Golden Leaf, I will also give you a deacon place! The deacon quota of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance does not depend on strength, but on background. Otherwise, no matter how strong you are, it will be difficult to get a deacon. "

"Longyan Lin Stone, this is the same as your name as the Ancient Emperor of Longyan, what is the value of this treasure?" Ye Tian was very curious.

The Ancient Emperor of Longyan did not hide it, and said directly: "The Ninefold Dao Realm is above the Legend Dao Realm, and it is necessary to condense the Legendary Body with the fourth sequence of Dao rules, and my Legendary Body is the Longyan Legendary Body, and I need a large number of Longyan Lin Stones to extract Longyan Lin Gold in order to grow and improve the Longyan Legendary Body." "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

Legend has it that he also understands the Dao realm, but he is still far away from this realm, and he doesn't know much.

But he is the Dao, and he needs to comprehend the third sequence to the Dao realm before he can impact the legendary Dao realm, and what this supreme Dao realm condenses is not an ordinary legendary body, but a top-level legendary body, based on the rules of the third sequence of the Dao Dao, far beyond the ordinary legendary body.

Of course, the progress of such a legendary body is also more terrifying, the materials required are too many and too rare, and the growth is extremely slow.

Therefore, none of the top members of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance have taken the path of supreme strength to the Dao.
